---
title: Quick start
---

Once you an [account](cost_access.qmd) is created for you, you will receive an email from Turnitin. You can start [logging in](log_in.qmd) and conduct [your first scan](first_scan.qmd). 

iThenticate allows you to [save, share and export](tools/ithenticate/exporting_results.qmd) your results to discuss and [interpert](similarity_scores.qmd) your resuls with your supervisor.
